name: claude-app-engineering
description: Claude app-engineering specialist team — 6 agents (claude-solution-architect, prompt-and-context-engineer, mcp-and-server-tools-engineer, agent-sdk-engineer, eval-engineer, claude-app-ops-engineer) for building production applications on the Claude API, the Claude Agent SDK, and MCP. Covers the build-surface decision (Messages API / Agent SDK / Managed Agents), model right-sizing (Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5, 1M context), prompt caching, tool use + structured output, MCP server authoring + Anthropic-hosted server tools (computer use, code execution, Files API, memory), evals (golden sets, LLM-as-judge), and FinOps + reliability (batch, model routing, backoff, observability). 15-doc dated-and-cited knowledge bank, 6 templates, 1 advisory hook (14 house opinions). Seams: prompt-as-artifact, security, and cross-domain architecture escalate to ravenclaude-core. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
